milestones.title: CLI Text Transformer
milestones.summary: Run a Rasa script that reads text, transforms it, and writes output.
milestones.pressure: strings, regex, files, stdio, args, exit status
requiredCapabilities: strings with documented indexing and character semantics
regex dialect decision and result model
file or stdio input
file or stdio output
CLI arguments or a small execution context
structured runtime errors for missing or denied capabilities

storyDetails.title: Practical input/output boundary
bullets: Choose the smallest non-fixture boundary: CLI arguments, stdin/stdout, file paths, or a host-admitted text buffer.
Prove admitted, denied, and unsupported-lane outcomes.
Keep host facts out of pure language semantics.

storyDetails.title: Text semantics review
bullets: Decide the first string indexing and character contract.
Name what is portable now and what remains deferred.

storyDetails.title: Regex alpha contract
bullets: Choose the first regex dialect boundary.
Define match, find, replace, split, and capture result shapes.

storyDetails.title: CLI execution context
bullets: Define how a script sees arguments, stdin, stdout, stderr, and exit status.
Keep host facts out of pure language semantics.

storyDetails.title: File/stdio capability alpha
bullets: Admit read/write operations through explicit capability evidence.
Prove denial and missing-capability diagnostics.

storyDetails.title: Demo script and report
bullets: Add one polished text-transformer example.
Show native proof.
Show runtime-Wasm proof over the same source-level contract. If blocked, the story cannot close; it must name the implementation blocker and next command.
Show a compact capability report rather than requiring users to read raw phase dumps.

milestones.title: Managed Lowering Performance
milestones.summary: Run and measure a pure Rasa application kernel through planned managed-value lowerings.
milestones.pressure: WasmGC, native-tier/Cranelift, bounded facts, plan authority, benchmark evidence

milestones.title: Browser Embedded Rasa
milestones.summary: Embed a Rasa evaluator in a browser page with controlled host callbacks.
milestones.pressure: Wasm session stability, sandboxed capabilities, UI diagnostics
requiredCapabilities: stable browser Wasm session lifecycle
reusable evaluator instance with persistent defs
explicit session reset
source loading for `rasa.core` through the same mechanism as native where possible
structured diagnostics and rendered values for UI consumption
host callback admission model for browser-provided functions
syntax highlighting or phase output that can support an editor surface

storyDetails.title: Browser session contract review
bullets: Define what a browser evaluator session owns.
Confirm how persistent defs, reset, core loading, and diagnostics line up with native runtime sessions.

storyDetails.title: Host callback capability alpha
bullets: Admit a tiny browser host capability surface.
Prove denied or missing callbacks report structured errors.
Keep callback identity and JavaScript values outside source semantics.

storyDetails.title: UI result contract
bullets: Define the result object the page receives after eval.
Include rendered value, structured diagnostics, phase status, and enough source span data for UI highlighting.

storyDetails.title: Embedded demo page
bullets: Build a small page with one Rasa input, one host-provided capability, and a reset button.
Reuse shared REPL/editor components where possible.

storyDetails.title: Native parity check
bullets: Show the same Rasa source can run through a native host harness with an equivalent admitted capability.
Record any browser-only or native-only limitations explicitly.

milestones.title: HTTP JSON Client Script
milestones.summary: Fetch JSON, transform data, and emit JSON from Rasa.
milestones.pressure: JSON, bytes/text boundaries, HTTP client capability, colorless suspension
requiredCapabilities: JSON parse/generate over Rasa maps, vectors, strings, numbers, booleans, and nil
bytes/text boundary decisions for request and response bodies
URI or URL validation policy
HTTP client capability admission
request/response map shape
structured errors for denied, unavailable, malformed, timeout, and non-2xx cases
suspension evidence without source-level async coloring

storyDetails.title: JSON value contract
bullets: Define JSON-to-Rasa and Rasa-to-JSON mapping.
Name numeric, keyword/string key, ordering, and unsupported-value behavior.

storyDetails.title: Body boundary contract
bullets: Decide when bodies are strings, bytes, or explicit decoded values.
Keep encoding failures structured.

storyDetails.title: HTTP request/response data shape
bullets: Define the minimal request map and response map.
Include status, headers, body, and error shape.

storyDetails.title: HTTP client capability alpha
bullets: Admit one outbound request operation through capability evidence.
Prove denied, missing, and unavailable host behavior.

storyDetails.title: Colorless suspension proof
bullets: Show source code does not need host-specific async syntax.
Record where the runtime may suspend and resume.

storyDetails.title: Demo script and report
bullets: Add a small script that fetches JSON from a controlled test host or fixture.
Show native proof.
Show browser/Wasm proof through fetch or an admitted host stub, or name the precise deferred host-lowering piece.

milestones.title: HTTP JSON Service
milestones.summary: Serve a small JSON endpoint from Rasa.
milestones.pressure: routing, request/response maps, lifecycle, concurrency, cancellation
requiredCapabilities: request map and response map contract
JSON body parse/generate reuse from the client milestone
header representation and normalization policy
HTTP server capability admission
route or handler invocation model
structured errors for handler failure, malformed response, denied server capability, port binding failure, and unsupported host lanes
suspension and cancellation evidence
resource cleanup for server lifecycle

storyDetails.title: Server request/response contract
bullets: Reuse or refine the client request/response map shape.
Define what an inbound request contains at alpha scope.

storyDetails.title: Handler invocation contract
bullets: Decide whether handlers are ordinary functions, protocol methods, or a capability-specific adapter shape.
Keep handler invocation as Rasa callable semantics, not host callback leakage.

storyDetails.title: Server capability alpha
bullets: Admit one HTTP server operation through capability evidence.
Prove denied, unavailable, malformed response, and handler failure paths.

storyDetails.title: Suspension, cancellation, and lifecycle proof
bullets: Name where the runtime may park and resume work.
Prove server shutdown or cleanup behavior at alpha scope.
Record deferred cancellation behavior explicitly.

storyDetails.title: Demo service and report
bullets: Add one small JSON endpoint demo.
Show native proof.
Show Wasm proof when a host can provide an inbound request loop, or name the precise host-lowering limitation.

milestones.title: Capability Model And Manifest Tooling
milestones.summary: Generate and validate capability models from provider/interface sources with small human policy overlays.
milestones.pressure: package loading, capability declarations, importer tooling, generated artifacts
requiredCapabilities: canonical Rasa capability model
importer path from at least one external interface source
policy overlay model separated from imported interface facts
Rasa-readable declaration surface or restricted data form
source-spanned validation diagnostics
generated capability catalog artifacts
generated denied, missing, and unsupported capability tests
documentation/reference projection from the same model

storyDetails.title: Capability model boundary
bullets: Define the Rasa-owned capability model independently of any one manifest syntax.
Separate imported interface facts from policy overlay facts.

storyDetails.title: Importer spike
bullets: Choose one source, likely WIT or existing provider metadata.
Generate a small capability model with source/provenance evidence.

storyDetails.title: Policy overlay sketch
bullets: Add a minimal human-authored overlay for exposure, names, authority, and deferrals.
Keep syntax explicitly experimental.

storyDetails.title: Rasa validation diagnostics
bullets: Validate the generated model and overlay through Rasa tooling.
Produce source-spanned diagnostics and suggested fixes for missing policy, unsupported shapes, or unavailable lanes.

storyDetails.title: Artifact generation
bullets: Generate capability catalog entries, reference docs, test skeletons, and website-capability projection data from the model.

storyDetails.title: Demo package/provider
bullets: Prove the flow on one tiny provider or package.
Show what was generated, what the user wrote, and what Rasa refused.
